meaning: n.[鍖朷涔欓叞姘存潹閰哥洂(鎴栭叝)
examples: Conclusion: While using acetylsalicylate in clinical practice, high attention must be paid to consequences of its adverse reactions.
Methods: Adverse reactions resulted from dl-lysine acetylsalicylate reported in recent years in domestic literatures were statistically classified and analyzed.
